data: {"generalSituation":"Under the influence of an active southerly airstream, there will still be occasional heavy showers and squally thunderstorms over the coast of Guangdong and the northern part of the South China Sea tomorrow. With the subtropical ridge over the western North Pacific extending westwards, showers will ease off gradually over Guangdong. The weather will improve on Tuen Ng Festival. It will become very hot gradually during the weekend to early next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260618","week":"Thursday","forecastWind":"South force 4 to 5, occasionally force 6 offshore, up to force 7 on high ground.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with showers and a few squally thunderstorms.
